task_completion.description: Navigate to the accounting journals section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the accounting journals list or settings page within the Ekylibre application.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new accounting journal
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'New journal' (or similar French equivalent like 'Nouveau journal') is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the journal name as 'Subventions PAC'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Subventions PAC' is entered into the 'Name' (or 'Nom') input field.
The text 'SUBV' is entered into the 'Code' input field.

task_completion.description: Select the journal nature as 'Various' or 'Opérations diverses'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Nature' dropdown or selection field shows 'Various', 'Diverse', 'Operations', or 'Opérations diverses'.
The 'Currency' (or 'Devise') field is set to 'EUR' or 'Euro'.
A success message is visible (e.g., 'Journal was successfully created'), or the new journal 'Subventions PAC' ('SUBV') appears in the list of accounting journals.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Ekylibre web interface rather than using terminal commands or API calls
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ekylibre web interface being clicked and typed into, not a terminal, console, or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated the menus and filled out the form rather than just editing HTML/DOM
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression from the dashboard to the accounting settings, opening the form, and typing the values step-by-step.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the expected values into a text file or notes app
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'SUBV' and 'Subventions PAC' are entered into the actual Ekylibre application fields, not a generic text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected journal code is 'SUBV'. The expected journal name is 'Subventions PAC'. The expected nature is 'various' (in the UI this might appear as 'Various', 'Diverse', 'Operations', or 'Opérations diverses'). The expected currency is 'EUR'.
